## Analyzers (2)

### [Investigate Categorization v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Investigate/Investigate_Categorization.json)
Retrieve Investigate categorization and security features for a domain.

- **Author:** Cisco Umbrella Research @opendns
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `domain`, `fqdn`

### [Investigate Sample v1.0](https://github.com/TheHive-Project/Cortex-Analyzers/blob/master/analyzers/Investigate/Investigate_Sample.json)
Retrieve sample data from Investigate for a hash. (Sample data provided by ThreatGrid)

- **Author:** Cisco Umbrella Research @opendns
- **License:** AGPL-V3
- **Data Types:** `hash`
